summary: Iteration 12 bug fix + v11 copy sync verified. Specificity fix for .pull inside .prose-method works — 'Where execution is part of the scope...' now renders as Cormorant Garamond italic, steel (#5A7D9A), 32px. All 5 pull spots (Home model, Home who, Work opener, About philosophy, About founder) render correctly. All v11 copy changes present across Work, About, and case studies. Hero subhead remains Akzidenz. Production build + strip pipeline clean. Zero console errors on all 7 routes.

All pull spots use Cormorant Garamond italic steel (#5A7D9A) at 32px on desktop. .prose-method specificity now solved via .prose-method .pull / .prose-method p.pull selectors in index.css. Preview URL: https://method-positioning.preview.emergentagent.com.
